success.description: You recite from the Book of Grudges, naming each unresolved grudge suffered by your clan, hold, and the dwarf people as a whole. You and your dwarf allies who can hear you speak gain either the Entergised, Inspired, or Invigorated condition for 2 rounds. If appropriate, you may also influence dwarfs who hear you speak

boon.description: The condition granted by this card lasts for 3 rounds instead

bane.description: Increase Party Tension by 1 and be more cautious about which Grudges you bring up in the future

sigmarsComet.description: So fierce is your rhetoric that you may grant all 3 conditions

reckless.name: Litany of Grudges
reckless.requirements: Dwarf Only. Target must be able to hear and understand you

success.description: You read off a litany of the Grudges perpetrated against your clan, your hold, and you personally by the target, his people, or people vaguely similar to the target. Influence the target, if appropriate, and he gains the Cowed or Rattled condition for 2 rounds (your choice)

boon.description: The condition granted by this card lasts for 3 rounds instead

bane.description: Increase Party Tension by 1 and be more cautious about which Grudges you bring up in the future

sigmarsComet.description: So fierce is your rhetoric that you may grant both conditions
